title: Kebab Kielbasa Sausage Skillet
description: A hearty and flavorful skillet dish featuring kebab sausage and polish sausage, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe is a twist on traditional sausage and potato dishes, with the added bonus of being easy to make and delicious.

ingredients.name: Kebab sausage
ingredients.notes: preferably with a mild or spicy flavor

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onions and bell peppers and cook until they begin to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced potatoes and cook for another 5 minutes, or until they begin to brown.
Add the sliced kebab sausage and polish sausage to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
